name: Green Dot Corporation
description: Green Dot Corporation is a financial technology and registered bank holding company committed to giving consumers and businesses the power to bank seamlessly, affordably, and securely. Founded in 1999, the company is a pioneer in prepaid card services and has expanded to offer a robust suite of financial technology solutions, including branchless banking, money movement services, and banking-as-a-service (BaaS) platforms for major consumer and technology brands.
